name: @act-spec/component-vue
description: PRD-302 Vue 3 binding for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 component contract (PRD-300). Implements the Vue declaration patterns (SFC default-export static field `Component.act = {…}`, `useActContract` composable, `<script setup>` `defineActContract` macro form, page-level boundary via `<ActSection>` wrapper or macro), the provide/inject collector for SSR-walk extraction via `@vue/server-renderer.renderToString`, the variant replay loop (fresh Vue app per variant), the placeholder emission contract via `app.config.errorHandler` (truncated and secret-redacted error messages), the Vue 3+ peer-dependency floor (Vue 2 explicitly out of scope), and the `BindingCapabilities` const with values pinned per A15-qualified PRD-302-R20 (only what v0.1 ships). Bridges Vue component trees to the framework-agnostic `NodeDraft` shape from `@act-spec/component-contract`.
